# revenuecat_package_product (Resource)

Attaches an existing RevenueCat product to a package.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "revenuecat_package_product" "web_monthly" {
  project_id           = var.revenuecat_project_id
  package_id           = revenuecat_package.monthly.id
  product_id           = var.revenuecat_web_monthly_product_id
  eligibility_criteria = "all"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `package_id` (String) RevenueCat package ID.
- `product_id` (String) Existing RevenueCat product ID.
- `project_id` (String) RevenueCat project ID.

### Optional

- `eligibility_criteria` (String) One of `all`, `google_sdk_lt_6`, or `google_sdk_ge_6`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Stable association identifier.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import revenuecat_package_product.web_monthly proj_example/pkge_example/prod_example
```
